definition: Multiple modalities (e.g., text+vision and/or audio) in the same model/product.
Calls external tools/APIs (function calling, tools, plugins).
Controls a computer UI (click/type/observe) as an action space.
Multi-step task completion/orchestration; may include planning and tool use.
Explicitly positioned as better at multi-step reasoning/harder problems.
Much larger context window than earlier generations (e.g., 100k+ tokens).
Model weights released publicly (or broadly downloadable).
Flagship / top-tier model release for the org (not necessarily open weights).
Designed to run on-device or on constrained hardware.
Targets physical-world/robot control or robotics benchmarks.
